SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARDEN, PATRICIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRE PROPERTIES, INC. NOTHING IN THIS JUGMENT SHAL PREVENT PLAINTIFF SEEKING EQUITABLE INDEMNITY FROM THE OTHER TENANTS OR THEIR GUARANTORS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
